title: Cobblemarks+ (Cobblemon)
description: Adds additional marks to Cobblemon, and improves some already existing ones!
body:
# **Cobblemarks+**

**Adds multiple marks to Cobblemon**, adds additional mod compatibility for currently existing ones, and adds obtainment methods for currently unobtainable ones! Full list of added marks and new obtainments in the changelog

Currently adds: **12 new marks, 1 newly obtainable pre-existing mark, and updates 1 mark for compatibility**.

Credit to LsDarkk for the mark sprites!

![Slugma with the new Mantle Mark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3560169e52c7b430348bb23c0b2fe36726d2cab2.png)
